title: Craftable Elytra tweak
description: This datapack allows players to craft Elytras using rare and valuable materials
body:
Tired of scouring endless End cities just to find a single Elytra?

This datapack introduces a balanced and immersive way to craft Elytras directly in survival mode!
Using rare resources like phantom membranes, blaze rod, diamond chestplate and Feather, players can now unlock the skies through effort and exploration — not just luck.

Whether you're playing solo or with friends, this datapack makes flight more accessible without breaking the vanilla experience. Perfect for servers, modded adventures, or just enhancing your world with a bit of freedom!



My discord is here: rollsroyce0991![Craft of elytra]
